utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 items by name. Now verify full specification per item: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided – fully specified. 3) transportation: has type, a brief description ('Round-trip with a Budget Airline for 4 passengers') and a total cost (€600). It lacks exact flight details (airline names, flight numbers, times), but the format only asks for 'flight details with costs'—the provided description counts as details, so acceptable. 4) accommodation: has type, a description ('4-night stay at the Historic Lodge') and cost (€420). The format asks 'hotel selection with costs'—a named selection is present, though not precise address; acceptable. 5) activities: list with names and individual costs—satisfies 'selected activities with costs'. 6) additional_services: given as 'None'—acceptable. 7) total_budget: includes total_cost, initial_budget, and remaining_funds—this is a complete cost breakdown matching the items listed. Therefore, all 7 items from the format are covered.

Additional services are 'None', so no mapping there.
